【按钮】销售线索 - 线索转出时推送飞书消息卡片到飞书群
remark: 线索转出时推送飞书消息卡片到飞书群
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 【按钮】销售线索 - 线索转出时推送飞书消息卡片到飞书群
 * @description 线索转出时推送飞书消息卡片到飞书群
 * @createTime 2026-01-26
 * @bindingObjectLabel 销售线索
 * @bindingObjectApiName LeadsObj
 * @函数需求编号
 */
def (Boolean error, QueryResult queryResult, String errorMessage) = Fx.object.find("feishu_message_card__c", //对象apiName
        FQLAttribute.builder()
                .columns(["_id", "name","card_structure__c","field_8yXhs__c","card_title__c","theme_color__c"]) //需要返回的字段
                .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["name": QueryOperator.EQ("新线索通知1")])) //查询条件
                .build(),
       SelectAttribute.builder()
                .build())
if (error) {
    log.error("获取对象异常" + errorMessage)

} else {
    log.info("获取对象成功" + queryResult)
    def dataList = queryResult.dataList as List //数据列表
    def total = queryResult.total //符合条件的数据总条数
    def size = queryResult.size  //本次返回的数据条数
    dataList.each {
        e ->
            Map map = e as Map
            def id = map['_id']
            def name = map['name']
            //获取当前消息卡片的所有卡片参数
            def (Boolean perror, QueryResult pQueryResult, String perrorMessage) = Fx.object.find("message_card_variable__c", //对象apiName
                    FQLAttribute.builder()
                            .columns(["placeholder__c","single_line_text__c","field_frtxz__c","field_86m09__c","title_bold__c","value_bold__c"]) //需要返回的字段
                            .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["feishu_message_card__c": QueryOperator.EQ(id)])) 
                            .orderBy(["display_order__c": 1]) //排序
                            .build(),
                   SelectAttribute.builder()
                            .build())
            if ( perror ){
              log.error("查询消息卡片参数时发生错误："+perror)
              return
            }
            
            //获取获取当前消息卡片的所有卡片参数数值
            log.info("消息卡片参数："+ pQueryResult)
            //Map bodyContent = Fx.json.parse(map['card_structure__c__o'] as String)
            
            List params = pQueryResult.dataList as List
            String contentBody = ""
            params.each {
              item ->
              String fieldAPI = item['single_line_text__c'] as String
              String placeholder = item['placeholder__c'] as String
              String displayName = item['field_frtxz__c'] as String
              Boolean titleBold = item['title_bold__c'] as Boolean
              Boolean valueBold = item['value_bold__c'] as Boolean
              String value = context.data[fieldAPI] as String
              if (titleBold ){
                displayName = "**" + displayName + "**"
              }
              if (valueBold ){
                value = "**" + value + "**"
              }
              if( contentBody == "" ){
                contentBody = displayName + "：" + value + "\n"
              }else{
                contentBody += displayName + "：" + value + "\n"
              }
              
            }
            String bContent = map['field_8yXhs__c__o'] as String
            log.info("消息卡片："+ map['field_8yXhs__c__o'])
            bContent = bContent.replace("{{contentBody}}",contentBody)
            bContent = bContent.replace("{{subtitle}}", (map['name'] as String))
            bContent = bContent.replace("{{title}}", (map['card_title__c'] as String))
            bContent = bContent.replace("{{theme_color}}", (map['theme_color__c'] as String))
            bContent = bContent.replace("{{objectId}}",(context.data['_id'] as String))
            log.info("消息卡片："+ bContent)
            log.info("robot-sub:"+(Fx.global.findByApiName("var_bhd9m__g")[1] as String))
            Map bodyContent = Fx.json.parse(bContent)
            StringBody body = StringBody.builder().content(bodyContent).build()
            Request request = Request.builder()
            .method("POST")
            .url(Fx.global.findByApiName("var_bhd9m__g")[1] as String)
            .timeout(7000)
            .retryCount(0)
            .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
            .body(body)
            .build()
            def(Boolean error1, HttpResult result, String message) = Fx.http.execute(request)
            if (error1 || result.statusCode != 200) {

            } else {
              def content = result.content //函数封装的结果，一般使用这个即可
              def byte[] bytes = result.bytes //原始的二进制结果数据，如果上边方式获取结果有问题/文件等非数据信息，可以使用这个
            }
    }
}

return "线索已转出，请查看飞书群卡片推送。"

function_name: 【公共类】获取飞书人员open id
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 【公共类】获取飞书人员open id
 * @description 1
 * @createTime 2026-02-05
 * @bindingObjectLabel --
 * @bindingObjectApiName NONE
 * @函数需求编号
 */

/**
 * @type classes
 * @returntype
 * @namespace library
 */
class PubLibWkawi {

    static Map getOpenIdByMobile(String mobile) {
        if (!mobile) return [ok:false, message:"手机号为空"]
        String token = PubLibFeishuToken.getTenantAccessToken()
        if (!token) return [ok:false, message:"获取Token失败"]
        // user_id_type 作为 URL 查询参数传递
        Map body = [mobiles: [mobile]]
        Request req = Request.builder()
                .method("POST")
                .url("https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/contact/v3/users/batch_get_id?user_id_type=open_id")
                .header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
                .header("Authorization", "Bearer " + token)
                .timeout(15000)
                .body(StringBody.builder().content(Fx.json.toJson(body)).build())
                .build()
        def (Boolean error, HttpResult result, String message) = Fx.http.execute(req)
        String contentText = (result?.content instanceof String) ? (result.content as String) : Fx.json.toJson(result?.content)
        log.info("[PubLibWkawi] mobile=" + mobile + " status=" + (result ? result.statusCode : "null") + " raw=" + contentText)
        if (error || !result || result.statusCode != 200) return [ok:false, message:(message ?: (contentText ?: ("HTTP " + (result ? result.statusCode : "null"))))]
        Map resp = [:]
        if (result.content instanceof String) { try { resp = Fx.json.parse(result.content as String) as Map } catch (Exception e) { resp = [:] } } else { resp = result.content as Map }
        def codeRaw = resp.get("code")
        Integer code = (codeRaw instanceof Number) ? (codeRaw as Integer) : ((codeRaw ?: "-1").toString() as Integer)
        if (code != 0) return [ok:false, message: (resp.get("msg") as String) ?: "接口返回错误"]
        Map data = (resp.get("data") as Map) ?: [:]
        // 兼容两种字段名：user_list（新版）和 user_infos（旧版）
        List infos = (data.get("user_list") as List) ?: (data.get("user_infos") as List) ?: []
        Map info0 = (infos && infos.size() > 0) ? (infos.get(0) as Map) : [:]
        String openId = (info0.get("user_id") as String) ?: ""
        if (!openId) return [ok:false, message:"未找到对应open_id"]
        [ok:true, open_id: openId]
    }

    static String action() { "sucesss" }

    static String action(String mobile) {
        Map r = getOpenIdByMobile(mobile)
        return (r.get("ok") as Boolean) ? (r.get("open_id") as String) : ""
    }

    static void main(String[] args) {
        String ret = (args != null && args.length > 0) ? action(args[0]) : action()
        log.info(ret)
    }
}

function_name: 【集成】同步后函数 关联租户subject id
【自定义控制器】租户充值明细嵌入
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-颜婷雅
 * @codeName 【自定义控制器】租户充值明细嵌入
 * @description 1
 * @createTime 2026-03-16
 * @bindingObjectLabel --
 * @bindingObjectApiName NONE
 * @函数需求编号
 */

import javax.crypto.Mac
import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets
import java.util.Base64

Integer code = 0
String message = "success"
Map<String, Object> result = new LinkedHashMap<>()

try {
  Map req = (syncArg instanceof Map) ? (syncArg as Map) : new LinkedHashMap()

  String type = (req?.type ?: "dashboard") as String
  Object idRaw = req?.id
  Integer viewId = null
  if (idRaw instanceof Number) { viewId = (idRaw as Number).intValue() } else if (idRaw) {
    try { viewId = Integer.valueOf(String.valueOf(idRaw)) } catch (Exception ignore) {}
  }
  if (viewId == null) viewId = 4
  Map params = new LinkedHashMap()

  // 传入租户 _id，查 tenant__c.name 作为 subject
  String tenantId = (req?.tenantId ?: req?.tenant_id ?: "") as String
  if (tenantId) {
    try {
      def (Boolean err, QueryResult res, String msg) = Fx.object.find("tenant__c",
        FQLAttribute.builder().columns(["name"]).queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["_id": QueryOperator.EQ(tenantId)])).build(),
        SelectAttribute.builder().needInvalid(false).build())
      if (!err && res?.dataList && !(res.dataList as List).isEmpty()) {
        String tenantName = ((res.dataList as List)[0] as Map).get("name") as String
        if (tenantName) params.put("subject", [tenantName])
      }
    } catch (Exception ex) { /* 查询失败 */ }
  }
  if (!params.containsKey("subject")) params.put("subject", [])

  Boolean bordered = (req?.bordered == null ? false : (req?.bordered as Boolean))
  Boolean titled = (req?.titled == null ? false : (req?.titled as Boolean))
  String host = (req?.host ?: "") as String
  Number ttlNum = (req?.ttl instanceof Number) ? (req?.ttl as Number) : null
  Long ttl = (ttlNum != null ? ttlNum.longValue() : 600L)

  def b64 = { byte[] data -> Base64.getUrlEncoder().withoutPadding().encodeToString(data) }
  def hmac = { String secret, String data ->
    Mac mac = Mac.getInstance("HmacSHA256")
    mac.init(new SecretKeySpec(secret.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8), "HmacSHA256"))
    b64(mac.doFinal(data.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)))
  }
  def jwt = { String secret, String t, Integer vid, Map pms, Long exp ->
    Map header = new LinkedHashMap()
    header.put("alg", "HS256")
    header.put("typ", "JWT")
    Map resource = new LinkedHashMap()
    if ("dashboard".equalsIgnoreCase(t)) { resource.put("dashboard", vid) } else { resource.put("question", vid) }
    Map payload = new LinkedHashMap()
    payload.put("resource", resource)
    payload.put("params", (pms != null ? pms : new LinkedHashMap()))
    payload.put("exp", exp)
    String h = b64(Fx.json.toJson(header).getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8))
    String p = b64(Fx.json.toJson(payload).getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8))
    String u = h + "." + p
    String s = hmac(secret, u)
    u + "." + s
  }

  Long nowSec = Math.floorDiv(System.currentTimeMillis(), 1000L)
  Long expSec = nowSec + ttl
  String secret = "fcb61af296668f58c749bbcd5d3db8800d8f1d5546bc8416a4f778cb7575587b"
  String token = jwt(secret, type, viewId, params, expSec)
  String hash = "bordered=" + (bordered ? "true" : "false") + "&titled=" + (titled ? "true" : "false")
  String base = host ? host.replaceAll('/$', '') : ''
  String url = (base ? (base + "/embed/" + type + "/" + token + "#" + hash) : ("/embed/" + type + "/" + token + "#" + hash))

  result.put("token", token)
  result.put("hash", hash)
  result.put("url", url)
} catch (Exception e) {
  if (code == 0) code = 500
  message = e.message ?: "error"
} finally {
  Map<String, Object> ret = new LinkedHashMap<>()
  ret.put("code", String.valueOf(code))
  ret.put("message", message)
  ret.put("data", result)
  return ret
}

function_name: 【自定义控制器】销售线索计量消费明细嵌入

【公共类】获取飞书token
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 【公共类】获取飞书租户token
 * @description 1
 * @createTime 2026-02-05
 * @bindingObjectLabel --
 * @bindingObjectApiName NONE
 * @函数需求编号
 */
class PubLibFeishuToken {
     static String APP_ID = "cli_a90e849f3d3d5cc2"
    static String APP_SECRET = "MXXlk9wJb3mXPSmpPuadkeXgwEQd46mm"

    static Map getToken() {
        Map body = [app_id: APP_ID, app_secret: APP_SECRET]
        Request req = Request.builder()
                .method("POST")
                .url("https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal")
                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
                .timeout(10000)
                .body(StringBody.builder().content(Fx.json.toJson(body)).build())
                .build()
        def (Boolean error, HttpResult result, String message) = Fx.http.execute(req)
        if (error || !result || result.statusCode != 200) return [ok:false, message:(message ?: "获取Token失败")]
        Map ret = [:]
        if (result.content instanceof String) { ret = Fx.json.parse(result.content as String) as Map } else if (result.content instanceof Map) { ret = result.content as Map }
        String token = (ret.get("tenant_access_token") as String) ?: ""
        if (!token) return [ok:false, message:"Token为空"]
        [ok:true, token: token]
    }

    static String getTenantAccessToken() {
        Map r = getToken()
        return (r.get("ok") as Boolean) ? (r.get("token") as String) : ""
    }

    static void main(String[] args) {
        String tk = getTenantAccessToken()
        log.info(tk)
    }
}

remark: 新建租户时，根据组织机构代码来查找是否有已有的客户，如果是，则将租户关联到此客户。如果不是，则新建一个客户，并关联租户到此客户。

function_name: 【集成】获取透支申请审批状态
【工作流】租户组织结构代码变更重新关联客户
remark: 组织机构代码变更时，根据组织机构代码来查找是否有已有的客户，如果是，则将租户关联到此客户。如果不是，则新建一个客户，并关联租户到此客户。新建客户时，将租户上的企业名称和组织机构代码赋值到客户的客户名称和统一信用代码字段。
body:
def tenantId = (context.data._id as String) ?: ""
def orgCode = (context.data.organization_code__c as String) ?: ""
def tenantName = (context.data.company_name__c as String) ?: ""

def (Boolean qErr, Map qOne, String qMsg) = Fx.object.findOne(
  "AccountObj",
  FQLAttribute.builder().columns(["_id"]).queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND([("uniform_social_credit_code"): QueryOperator.EQ(orgCode)])).build(),
  SelectAttribute.builder().build()
)
String customerId = (qOne?.get("_id") as String) ?: ""
log.info(customerId)

if (!customerId) {
  Map customerData = [
    ("name"): (tenantName ?: orgCode),
    ("uniform_social_credit_code"): orgCode
  ] as Map<String,Object>
  log.info("创建：" + Fx.json.toJson(customerData))
  def (Boolean cErr, Map cData, String cMsg) = Fx.object.create(
    "AccountObj",
    customerData,
    [:],
    CreateAttribute.builder().build()
  )
  customerId = ((cData?.get("_id")) as String) ?: ((cData?.get("data") as Map)?.get("_id") as String) ?: ""
  if (cErr || !customerId) return [success:false, message:(cMsg ?: "创建客户失败")] 
}

log.info("关联租户到客户：customerId=" + customerId)
def (Boolean uErr, Map uData, String uMsg) = Fx.object.update(
  "tenant__c",
  tenantId,
  [("customer__c"): customerId] as Map<String,Object>,
  UpdateAttribute.builder().triggerWorkflow(true).build()
)
if (uErr) return [success:false, message:(uMsg ?: "租户关联客户失败")] 

return [success:true, message:"租户已关联客户", customer_id: customerId]

usedInfo.label: 工作流：【租户】组织结构代码变更后重新关联客户

function_name: 【流程】线索 - 新建线索将客户名称中的中文符号改成英文符号
remark: 新建线索将客户名称中的中文符号改成英文符号
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 【流程】线索 - 新建线索将客户名称中的中文符号改成英文符号
 * @description 新建线索将客户名称中的中文符号改成英文符号
 * @createTime 2026-01-27
 * @bindingObjectLabel 销售线索
 * @bindingObjectApiName LeadsObj
 * @函数需求编号
 */
String accName = context.data.company as String;
Map<String, String> map = [
        '，': ',',
        '。': '.',
        '：': ':',
        '；': ';',
        '？': '?',
        '！': '!',
        '（': '(',
        '）': ')',
        '【': '[',
        '】': ']',
        '『': '[',
        '』': ']',
        '《': '<',
        '》': '>',
        '“': '"',
        '”': '"',
        '‘': '\'',
        '’': '\'',
        '、': ',',
        '—': '-',
        '～': '~',
        '　': ' '   // 中文全角空格
    ]
map.each {
    key, value ->
    accName = accName.replace(key, value)
}
log.info("英文化符号:" + accName)
String objectAPIName = 'LeadsObj'
String dataId = context.data._id as String; 
Map updateData = [
  "company": accName
]
def (Boolean error, Map data, String errorMessage) = Fx.object.update(objectAPIName, dataId, updateData, UpdateAttribute.builder().triggerWorkflow(true).build())
if (error) {
  log.info("error:" + errorMessage)
}

usedInfo.label: 工作流：新建线索时，将中文符号统一成英文符号

usedInfo.label: 工作流：线索领取分配后设置回收时间
